title: cephalanthera × mayeri
intro: Cephalanthera × mayeri is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Cephalanthera damasonium and Cephalanthera longifolia, commonly found in Central Europe. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoid and phenolic acid content, which has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Cephalanthera × mayeri has been used to alleviate various health issues, including respiratory problems, cardiovascular diseases, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its ability to relax blood vessels, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, although its use is not well-documented and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
